name: unknown long-tail predicate commits raw with no review card
description: Two-tier predicate model (docs/ENTITY_GRAPH_REFOCUS_PLAN.md section 1): favoriteColor is declared by no entity type, so it is tier-2 long-tail. The pipeline's alias collapse misses (no durable predicate_aliases row), and the fact commits on its raw spelling — no embed round-trip, no new_predicate card, no unknown-predicate weight penalty holding it below the commit threshold. Pins the Wave-1 inversion of the retired behavior, where every unknown spelling filed one open new_predicate card. The zero-count review_items block mirrors rel_conjoined_past_employers.

steps.body: Just noting for the record that my favorite color is teal.
